name: Hongda High-Tech Holding Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hongda High-Tech Holding Co.,Ltd. engages in warp-knitting, medical device, trading, and financial investment businesses in China. The company offers automotive interior decorative, lingerie, swimwear elastic, and sports and leisure fabrics. It also provides home textile fabrics for manufacturing curtains, sofas, and beddings. In addition, the company manufactures and retails medical devices for diagnosing the problems of liver, gallbladder, spleen, kidney, pancreas, heart, thyroid, breast, bladder, etc. Further, it exports its automotive interior fabrics to the United States, Germany, Japan, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Zhejiang Hongda Warp Knitting Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hongda High-Tech Holding Co.,Ltd. in August 2010. Hongda High-Tech Holding Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1985 and is based in Haining, China.
